5. Context to Provide to AI for Handoff
Purpose: Describe precisely what the AI’s output will be utilized for (concept draft, code skeleton, documentation, or world-building script).
Constraints: Indicate the scope, preferred formats, style guides, or any technological limitations.
Dependencies:
Mention the tools, frameworks, or data that the AI can assume are available.
